introSection: Montaña Rusa is a steel roller coaster which travels with Felicilandia in Chile.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Two cars collided while the coaster was operating in Viña del Mar, injuring three people.

fullText:
Montaña Rusa is a steel roller coaster which travels with Felicilandia in Chile.

Two cars collided while the coaster was operating in Viña del Mar, injuring three people.
